title: Let's set you up
subtitle: A few quick questions so we can build your perfect plan

langStep.title: Choose your language
langStep.subtitle: You can change this anytime in settings

fitnessLevel.title: How experienced are you?
fitnessLevel.subtitle: Pick the one that sounds most like you.
fitnessLevel.hint: This sets how fast we push your weights up and how technical the exercises get. Honest is better — starting too heavy causes injury, starting too light just means faster progression.

beginner.label: Just getting started
beginner.desc: Less than a year of regular training, or getting back after a long break

intermediate.label: I train consistently
intermediate.desc: 1–3 years of regular training, comfortable with the basics

advanced.label: I know what I'm doing
advanced.desc: 3+ years of structured training, comfortable with complex lifts

goal.title: What's your main goal?
goal.subtitle: This shapes your rep ranges and progression style.
goal.hint: Your goal changes how we program your sets and reps. For example, strength training uses lower reps with heavier weight, while muscle building uses moderate weight with more volume. You can always change this later.

fat_loss.label: Lose Fat
fat_loss.desc: Burn fat while keeping your muscle

strength.label: Get Stronger
strength.desc: Lift heavier, hit new personal bests

training.title: Training setup
training.subtitle: How often do you train, and what equipment do you have?
training.daysCommit: How many days can you realistically commit to?
training.freq3: Great for push/pull/legs or upper/lower splits
training.freq6: High frequency — make sure you're recovering well
training.equipmentHint: Select everything you have access to at your gym.

schedule.title: Lock In Your Schedule
schedule.subtitle: Members who commit to specific days are 2x more likely to stick with it
schedule.daysPrefilled: Pre-filled based on your frequency — adjust as needed.
schedule.selectAtLeast: Select at least one day to continue.
schedule.preferTime: I prefer to train in the...
schedule.timeHint: We'll time your reminders to match.
schedule.partnerQuestion: Do you have a workout partner at this gym?

bodyStats.title: Almost done
bodyStats.subtitle: Skip anything you don't want to fill in — you can always add it later.
bodyStats.weightHint: Used to track your progress over time.
bodyStats.injuriesHint: We'll avoid exercises that stress these areas and suggest safer alternatives.
bodyStats.areasCount: {{count}} area flagged — we'll work around these.
bodyStats.areasCount_plural: {{count}} areas flagged — we'll work around these.

social.title: Find Your Gym Squad
social.subtitle: Members with 3+ gym friends stay 56% longer
social.hint: Head to the Social tab after setup to add friends — members who train together, stay together.
social.feedPreview: What you'll see in your social feed
social.mockStreakDesc: Hasn't missed a day in two weeks

disclaimer: This app provides fitness tracking tools only and does not constitute medical advice. Consult a healthcare professional before beginning any exercise program.
